value.found_quote:
## Supported Actions & Matching Rules

| Action | Target Format | Matching Behavior | Default Fallback |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `read_file` | `read_file(/path)`, `read_file(dir)`, or `read_file(*)` | ... | `write_file` ... | `read_url` ... | `execute_url` ... | `command` ... | `unsandboxed` ... | `mcp`
value.rationale: The page contains a "Supported Actions & Matching Rules" section with a table listing all named actions: read_file, write_file, read_url, execute_url, command, unsandboxed, and mcp (MCP). This directly substantiates the claim. The page is part of Antigravity 2.0 documentation describing the permission engine as a current capability.
